item.title: Luke Combs, Brooks & Dunn - 1, 2 Many (Official Video)
item.description:
Listen to “1, 2 Many” from Luke Combs’ album, ‘What You See Is What You Get’, available now: http://smarturl.it/WYSIWYG?IQid=youtube
Spotify: http://smarturl.it/WYSIWYG/spotify?IQid=youtube Apple Music: http://smarturl.it/WYSIWYG/applemusic?IQid=youtube Amazon Music: http://smarturl.it/WYSIWYG/az?IQid=youtube iTunes: http://smarturl.it/WYSIWYG/itunes?IQid=youtube YouTube Music: http://smarturl.it/WYSIWYG/youtubemusic?IQid=youtube Pandora: http://smarturl.it/WYSIWYG/pandora?IQid=youtube All retailers: http://smarturl.it/WYSIWYG?IQid=youtube
Connect With Luke: Instagram: http://instagram.com/lukecombs Facebook: http://facebook.com/lukecombs Twitter: http://twitter.com/lukecombs Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/LCYTsub?IQid=youtube Website: http://www.lukecombs.com
#LukeCombs #12Many #WhatYouSeeIsWhatYouGet
